The '''Rendili Home Defense Fleet''', sometimes called the '''Rendili Home Fleet''', was the space defense force of the shipyard world of [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]].

==History==
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Home Defense Fleet was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jace Dallin]], a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] loyalist and [[Stark Hyperspace War/Legends|Stark Hyperspace War]] veteran, from the [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|Dreadnaught]] flagship ''[[Mersel Kebir]]''. When the pro-[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Independent Provisional Government of Rendili|Independent Provisional Government]] took power on Rendili, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]]<ref name="Rep69" /> [[Mellor Yago]]<ref name="Rep70" /> arrested Captain [[Jace Dallin]] aboard the flagship after he attempted to lead the fleet in defection to the Republic, along with the Jedi who had come, hoping to withdraw and join the Confederacy's forces—with him in command.<ref name="Rep69" />

With the help of the Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] and Republic Captain [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]], Captain Dallin recaptured the command ship, turning the fire of the Home Defense Fleet on the Separatist ships that had joined [[Battle of Rendili|the battle]], winning a resounding victory for the Republic.<ref name="Rep71" />

However, the incident gave Palpatine the pretext for placing the autonomous naval defense forces of Republic worlds under his executive command. The ships of the Rendili Home Defense Fleet were converted into [[Prison ship/Legends|dungeon ships]],<ref name="Rep71" /> and shortly after the [[Declaration of a New Order]], Jace Dallin had the dubious distinction of being the first captain in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to be summarily executed by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] for refusing to comply.<ref name="Rep78">[[Republic 78|''Republic'' 78]]</ref>

==Equipment==
During the Rendili Fleet crisis, the Home Defense Fleet consisted of a force<ref name="Rep69" /> of Rendili StarDrive's Dreadnaught heavy cruisers,<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|III|92|Rendili}}</ref> with systems linked together by slave circuits. Officers on the bridge of the ''Mersel Kebir'' wore a blue uniform with a padded leather collar covering the shoulders, and a decorative tabard.<ref name="Rep70" />
